goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: The failure is harness-only: Playwright substring label matching makes Location resolve both the Location select and Shelf or sub-location. An exhaustive remaining-label audit found no other unresolved collision, so only exact:true on that locator is authorized.

worker_package.objective: Add exact:true only to the Add Pantry item Location locator, preserve every other behavior, then complete the two independent browser workflows and remaining evidence.
verify: Change only add.getByLabel('Location') to exact:true; preserve all other locators/assertions.
Run scoped format/lint and one-file mirror hash equality.
Run fresh management workflow with all actions, three axe/overflow/screenshots, and no browser errors.
Release port, prepare fresh, run old integrated workflow with 400/350/50, provenance/manual/intake/FEFO/history, two axe, five screenshots, and no browser errors.
Inspect persistence read-only, run disposable migrate/db check, release port, and record diff/status integrity.
stop_if: Pre-edit hash differs or any other selector/product/fixture/assertion/timeout/file change is required.
Workflows share state/database/server or either fails twice.

evidence: Rendered error resolved Location to the exact select and Shelf or sub-location input.
Quantity already uses exact:true; all other static/dynamic labels are unique within their existing scopes.
T042 passed the exact nested Basket path before this collision.

parallel_safety.rationale: One mirror, DB path, artifact family, and port require serial lifecycles.

missing_evidence: Passing management and integrated workflows with accessibility/screenshots
Persistence, disposable DB, port, and diff proof
required_board_updates: Keep T999 blocked and require another Judge.
